title: Primal Craft LT Triassic
description: Trapped in the past with the prehistoric creatures of the past (Triassic)
body:
**Trapped in the Triassic era, you find yourself surviving alongside prehistoric creatures . adapt to the harsh landscape and unravel ancient mysteries to find your way back home in this prehistoric adventure. the goal of this modpack is you go back in Triassic form prehistoric nature mod which adds many new dimension form that past and many mods that add stone age stuff like a spear to make to survive  and find a way back to the present day. the main mod in this pack is the prehistoric nature an fossils and  archeology  offers archaeological aspect for the people who like to explore more or collect beautiful new blocks.**



### **The other periods**

[Primal Craft LT Jurassic](https://modrinth.com/modpack/primal-craft-lt-jurassic)       
[Primal Craft LT Permian](https://modrinth.com/project/primal-craft-lt-permian)   
[Primal Craft LT Carboniferous](https://modrinth.com/project/primal-craft-lt-carboniferous)         
[Primal Craft LT Devonian](https://modrinth.com/project/primal-craft-lt-devonian)

 ### **want to play with others? we have e4mc Retro** 
<details>
<summary>what does e4mc do?</summary>
The modpack features e4mc, which gives users the ability to let their friends connect to their world to do so just Open to LAN as normal. A public domain will appear alongside the local port. Others can simply connect to the public domain to connect to your LAN server.

</details>     

                



Note: allocate about 4GB or more



Optifine: Optifine does work but you need to be using the newest version of optifine to work
